heading: “Qualified applicant” defined
label: 702 “Qualified applicant” defined
text: For the purposes of this chapter a qualified applicant is a residential occupant-owner, as of , of valuable improvements in an unpatented mining claim which constitute for him a principal place of residence and which he and his predecessors in interest were in possession of for not less than seven years prior to .October 23, 1962July 23, 1962
